about.title: 背后的团队
about.description: MonkeyPlan是一个旨在简化您的工作的修理管理平台。
about.subtitle: 我们是技术支持领域的开发人员和专业人士团队，共同致力于改变意大利修理中心的管理方式。
about.missioneDesc: 简化和数字化技术支持中心的管理，用所有人都可以获得的专业工具消除浪费和低效。
about.innovazioneDesc: 我们为修理部门开发尖端技术：集成财政POS、智能工作流程和流程自动化。
about.passioneDesc: 我们来自该部门的直接经验。我们了解修理设备人员的日常挑战，并创建定制解决方案。
about.affidabilitaDesc: 数据安全、持续备份和意大利财政合规。您的数据是安全的，始终可访问。
about.storiaSubtitle: 一段旅程，源于现场经验和创新一个经常被技术忽视的部门的愿望。
about.milestone1Desc: MonkeyPlan从需要一个完整和现代的支持部门管理系统而形成。

about.milestone3Desc: 平台推出，包括财政POS、B2B、市场、保修和供应商集成。
about.milestone4Desc: 为平台早期采用者开放前100个免费许可证。

faq.title: 常见
faq.subtitle: 查找有关MonkeyPlan最常见问题的答案。如果找不到您要查找的内容，请随时与我们联系。
faq.a1: MonkeyPlan是为技术支持中心、电话店、二手转售和多门店网络设计的完整管理软件。它在单一平台中管理修理、仓库、账单、财政POS、票务、CRM等。
faq.a2: 是的，前100个许可证完全免费。您可以免费使用所有平台功能。
faq.q3: 我需要安装任何东西吗？
faq.a3: 不，MonkeyPlan是一个可从任何浏览器访问的Web平台。不需要软件安装，只需要互联网连接。
faq.a4: MonkeyPlan支持4个主要角色：管理员（完整管理）、经销商（销售和分配）、修理中心（修理管理）和客户（跟踪和请求）。每个角色都有自己的专职员工。
faq.q5: 我可以管理多个门店吗？
faq.a5: 绝对是的。MonkeyPlan旨在为多门店网络设计，支持多个仓库、商品转移、位置间B2B订单和集中管理。
faq.q6: POS是否符合意大利税务法规？
faq.a6: 是的，我们的POS支持多税率增值税、电子收据、每日累进编号、彩票代码和通过Fiskaly SIGN IT与云远程信息处理登记的集成。
faq.a7: MonkeyPlan包括用于管理保修和保险的完整系统：多租户保修目录、修理接收时的报价、完整的客户历史和自动计费。
faq.a8: 是的，我们使用具有持续备份、加密连接和安全会话认证的PostgreSQL数据库。数据根据欧洲法规进行保护。
faq.q9: 我可以将MonkeyPlan与我的供应商集成吗？
faq.a9: 是的，MonkeyPlan支持与SIFAR、Foneday和MobileSentrix等供应商的集成，用于自动目录导入、订单管理和装运跟踪。
faq.a10: 我们正在开发具有通过Expo推送通知支持的移动应用程序。Web平台已经完全响应式，可从智能手机和平板电脑使用。
faq.a11: 注册后，您可以直接从仪表板开张支持票。我们的团队在24小时内回复。如需一般信息，您可以通过电子邮件与我们联系。
faq.a12: 当然！用户反馈是必要的。您可以通过票务系统或电子邮件向我们发送建议。
faq.ctaSubtitle: 直接与我们联系，我们很乐意为您帮助。
faq.ctaContact: 联系我们了解更多信息

terms.title: Terms and
terms.s1Content: "Platform" refers to MonkeyPlan, the management software accessible via web. "User" indicates any natural or legal person who creates an account on the Platform. "Service" indicates the functionalities offered by the Platform, including but not limited to: repair management, warehouse, fiscal POS, ticketing, CRM, B2B orders and marketplace.
terms.s2Content: Access to and use of the Platform are subject to acceptance of these Terms and Conditions. By registering and using MonkeyPlan, you fully accept these terms. If you do not accept, do not use the Service.
terms.s3Content: To use the Platform it is necessary to create an account providing truthful and up-to-date information. You are responsible for the security of your login credentials and all activities carried out through your account. MonkeyPlan reserves the right to suspend or close accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s4Content: MonkeyPlan grants the User a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable and revocable license to use the Platform in accordance with these Terms. MonkeyPlan reserves the right to modify pricing plans with adequate notice.
terms.s5Content: The User agrees to: (a) use the Platform in compliance with applicable laws; (b) not attempt unauthorized access to systems; (c) not use the Platform for illegal, fraudulent or harmful activities; (d) keep their information up to date; (e) comply with tax obligations related to the use of POS and billing features.
terms.s6Content: All intellectual property rights relating to the Platform, including software, design, trademarks, logos and content, belong to MonkeyPlan. The User does not acquire any ownership rights over the Platform. Data entered by the User remains the property of the User.
terms.s7Content: The processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy. MonkeyPlan processes data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR). By using the Platform, the User consents to the processing of their data as described in the Privacy Policy.
terms.s8Content: MonkeyPlan is provided "as is". We do not guarantee that the Service is free from errors or interruptions. MonkeyPlan is not responsible for direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of the Platform, including data loss, lost profits or business interruptions.
terms.s9Content: The fiscal POS and billing features are support tools. The User is solely responsible for the correct application of current tax regulations, including VAT rates, receipt issuance and electronic submission. MonkeyPlan does not provide tax advice.
terms.s10Content: MonkeyPlan reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be communicated through the Platform or by email. Continued use of the Service after notification of changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.s11Content: The User may close their account at any time. MonkeyPlan reserves the right to suspend or close an account in case of violation of these Terms, with notice where possible.
terms.s12Content: These Terms are governed by Italian law. For any dispute arising from the use of the Platform, the Court of the place of MonkeyPlan's registered office has jurisdiction.

privacy.title: 隐私
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy describes how MonkeyPlan collects, uses, stores and protects your personal data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).
privacy.s1Content: The Data Controller is MonkeyPlan, based in Italy. For any request regarding the processing of personal data, you can contact us at the email address: privacy@monkeyplan.it.
privacy.s2Content: We collect the following categories of data: (a) Registration data: name, surname, email, username, role; (b) Business data: company name, VAT number, tax code, address; (c) Usage data: access logs, platform actions, preferences; (d) Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system; (e) Managed device data: IMEI, serial, model (entered by the user for repair management).
privacy.s3Content: Personal data is processed for the following purposes: (a) provision and management of the Service; (b) account authentication and security; (c) Service-related communications; (d) compliance with legal and tax obligations; (e) Platform improvement and aggregate analysis; (f) technical support and ticket management.
privacy.s4Content: Data processing is based on the following legal bases under the GDPR: (a) performance of a contract (art. 6.1.b); (b) compliance with legal obligations (art. 6.1.c); (c) legitimate interest of the Controller (art. 6.1.f); (d) consent of the data subject, where required (art. 6.1.a).
privacy.s5Content: Personal data is retained for the time necessary to pursue the purposes for which it was collected. Account data is retained for the entire duration of the contractual relationship and for the following 10 years to comply with tax and legal obligations. Access logs are retained for 6 months.
privacy.s6Content: Personal data is not sold to third parties. It may be shared with: (a) technical service providers (hosting, database) necessary for the Platform's operation; (b) competent authorities where required by law; (c) other Platform users to the extent necessary for the Service's operation (e.g., contact data between reseller and repair center).
privacy.s7Content: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect personal data, including: encryption of communications (TLS), password hashing, role-based access control, periodic backups, access monitoring.
privacy.s8Content: Under the GDPR, the data subject has the right to: (a) access their personal data; (b) rectify inaccurate data; (c) delete their data ("right to be forgotten"); (d) restrict processing; (e) data portability; (f) object to processing; (g) withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact: privacy@monkeyplan.it.
privacy.s9Content: The Platform uses strictly necessary technical cookies for the Service's operation (e.g., authentication session management). We do not use profiling cookies or third-party cookies for advertising purposes.
privacy.s10Content: Data is stored on servers located in the European Union. In case of transfer to third countries, the guarantees provided by the GDPR will be adopted, including the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission.
privacy.s11Content: The Service is not aimed at minors under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If we become aware that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it.
privacy.s12Content: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy. Changes will be communicated through the Platform and/or by email. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of the document.
privacy.s13Content: The data subject has the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority (Data Protection Authority) if they believe that the processing of their data violates the GDPR.

subResellers.infoDescription: 了解子经销商与维修中心的区别
subResellers.infoSubResellerExplanation: 子经销商是一个在您的品牌下运营的独立商业伙伴。他们可以管理自己的客户，销售您的产品和服务，甚至拥有自己的维修中心。把它想象成您业务的延伸：他们有自己的账户、自己的定价，并可以开具自己的发票。
subResellers.infoRepairCenterExplanation: 维修中心是执行实际设备维修的技术车间。它从您或您的子经销商处接收维修订单，进行诊断、报价和维修。维修中心专注于技术方面，不管理客户也不销售产品。
subResellers.infoDiffCommercial: 子经销商处理商业方面（销售、客户、开票），而维修中心处理技术方面（维修、诊断、零件）。
subResellers.infoDiffHierarchy: 子经销商可以拥有自己的维修中心，从而创建多级网络。
subResellers.infoDiffAccess: 子经销商可以查看产品、价格和客户；维修中心可以查看维修订单、零件库存和诊断。
